meta.reasoning: As Evil leader on Quest 1, proposing myself + a Good player (s3) and intending to play success. This builds trust for s1, keeps s2 hidden, and gives Good players no suspicion evidence. A failed Quest 1 would immediately implicate one of the 2-person team.
